CustomField.description: NATT formatted address for use in components
CustomField.formula: IF(ISBLANK(NATT_JDE_Alpha_Name__c),NULL,NATT_JDE_Alpha_Name__c + BR()) + IF(ISBLANK(NATT_Street__c),NULL,NATT_Street__c + BR()) + IF(ISBLANK(NATT_Street_2__c),NULL,NATT_Street_2__c + BR()) + IF(ISBLANK(NATT_Street_3__c),NULL,NATT_Street_3__c + BR()) + IF(ISBLANK(NATT_Street_4__c),NULL,NATT_Street_4__c + BR()) + IF(ISBLANK(NATT_City__c),NULL,NATT_City__c + ", ") + TEXT(NATT_State_Province__c) + " " + NATT_Zip_Postal_Code__c + BR() + TEXT(NATT_Country__c)
CustomField.label: Address (Formatted)
